K0100Z_NO_SWLWG_CD K0100Z Swallowing Disorder: None of Above Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the resident had none of the above signs or symptoms of a swallowing disorder. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
373 K0200A_HGT_NUM K0200A_HGT_NUM K0200A Height Number CHAR 2 The data in this column contains the resident's height (in inches). 0 Minimum
99 Maximum
- Not assessed/no information
374 K0200B_WT_NUM K0200B_WT_NUM K0200B Weight Number CHAR
